O-O/5...Be7/6. Re1/6...b5/7. Bb3/7...O-O/8. c3/8...d5/9. exd5/9...Nxd5/10. Nxe5/10...Nxe5/11. Rxe5/11...c6/12. d4/12...Bd6/13. Re1/13...Qh4|'''13...Qh4''']] doubling the attack on the h2-pawn.{{wikipedia|Marshall Gambit}}{{Chess Opening Theory/Footer}}
